reviews.review_description:
The game was good until there were too many people that supplies ran out faster than i could buy them
keep in mind i only had four people and if i didn't put them in an area i would be charged money
so in conclusion with the non ability to even play without losin this game is not fun at all

developer_response.body:
Since your review, we’ve released an update that rebalances resource consumption and staffing costs, especially in the early stages. The goal was to prevent situations where supplies run out too quickly or players feel penalized just for assigning people to roles. We appreciate you calling this out during Early Access. If you decide to revisit the game, we hope these changes make the experience feel more fair and enjoyable.


Best regards,

reviews.review_description:
Quarantine Protocol: Infection Zone VR delivers an interesting and original concept where you are put in charge of a quarantine zone and must decide the fate of incoming refugees. Do you isolate them, treat them, clear them… or make harder choices? Every decision matters and adds real tension to the experience.

On top of that, you must manage limited resources such as food and water while also surviving intense zombie attack waves during action-packed shooting sequences. This blend of management, moral decisions, and combat works surprisingly well in VR.

Still in Early Access, the game already shows strong potential, and a major update has just been released, bringing noticeable improvements. A very promising title that’s worth keeping a close eye on as development continues.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words and thoughtful feedback. As the game is still in Early Access, hearing that the recent update made a noticeable difference truly means a lot to the team. Feedback always motivates us to keep improving and refining the experience. Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts. 

Best Regards,

reviews.review_title: Move the tools to spots on the body
reviews.review_description: Having the tablet permanently glued to your hand limits people in choices and making people use the tablet to equip tools makes it harder to map out the symptoms. Please have the tablet and tools be on the body so it's not a hassle to find them

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and for sharing your experience. We are continuously working to improve and optimize the game, and your suggestion regarding tool and tablet placement will definitely be considered. We truly appreciate your support and helping us make the experience better. 

Best Regards

reviews.review_description: It feels impossible to even beat the level without the food running out . This game is not like the one i seen other people play just save yall money this game sucks.

developer_response.body:
Since your review, we’ve released an update that rebalances resource consumption and staffing costs, especially in the early stages. The goal was to prevent situations where supplies run out too quickly or players feel penalized just for assigning people to roles. We appreciate you calling this out during Early Access. If you decide to revisit the game, we hope these changes make the experience feel more fair and enjoyable.

Best Regards

reviews.review_description: Both the movement being way too sensitive and the look to aim feature were not the best of choices for a zombie game
Not how I saw it on YouTube

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. We’re sorry the experience didn’t match what you expected from the videos you saw. The game has evolved since earlier footage, and we’ve recently released updates improving performance, balance, and overall gameplay.

If you decide to give it another try, we hope the current version better reflects the experience we’re aiming for.

reviews.review_description: Saw some negative reviews but decided to give it a try due to one 5 star pretty good game very repetitive could use some variation I was getting a lot of completely good people in a row. Not sure if what I encountered with liquidation is a bug or not decided to liquidate someone and when I was trying to hit the button it kept saying there were people still in zones but the safe/quarantine zone was empty do I have to physically do the liquidation?….. About all the reviews on losing money/food/fuel too quickly, it seems the update they put out really helped it. Would like to see a difficultly setting I definitely didn’t start making bad choices to lose money to give a challenge or anything. But all in all pretty good.
